name: @leandown/vscode
description: Interactive Lean 4 support inside Markdown files, synchronizing with the Lean 4 Infoview

commands.title: Lean Markdown: Open Companion Lean File

leandown.autoOpenCompanion.description: Automatically open the companion `.lean` file side-by-side when opening a Markdown file with Lean code blocks.

leandown.tempDir.description: Designated directory to store synthetic Lean files. If empty, uses the '.leandown' folder in the workspace root, falling back to the system temp directory.

scripts.build: bun build src/extension.ts --outdir dist --format cjs --target node --external vscode
